title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions:
Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions!
